crossSignals.label: Crowd vs tape (context only)
crossSignals.reading: The crowd's 'How many Fed rate cuts in 2026?' market repriced ~13.7pp (24h); separately, BTC was -2.8% over the same window. Observed crypto regime label: risk-off.
crossSignals.note: Market context only — two observed moves shown side by side. No causal relationship implied; not predictive or investment commentary.
